global_description: A medium-sized bird with a sleek, elongated body. It features a striking red cap on its head, a pale face, and a black and white barred back. The underparts are a soft, pale gray with a subtle red wash on the belly. The wings are pointed and the tail is short.

part_details.head: Bright red cap covering the crown and nape, contrasting with a pale face.
part_details.back: Black and white horizontal barring creating a striped pattern.
part_details.belly: Soft pale gray with a faint red wash.
part_details.wings: Pointed with black and white barring.
part_details.tail: Short and black with white outer feathers.

spatial_relations: The red cap covers the top of the head and nape.
The barred pattern extends across the back and wings.
The pale face contrasts with the red cap.
The red wash is located on the lower belly.
